audit_policy.cost_note: MA residents 60+ may attend state community college courses tuition-free on a space-available basis.

senior_discount.notes: Massachusetts residents aged 60+ may attend courses at state community colleges tuition-free on a space-available basis per MGL c. 15A, §19.
